subcodes.first_line: O my God! These servants Thou hast guided to the wellspring of Thy mercy, and led them unto the shores [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی هولاء عباد هدیتهم الی معین رحمانیتک و اوردتهم علی شریعه
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
